title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Muddy Runaway Festival ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios fight for the
lead on the long final stretch of the autumn
Tenno Sho, and the crowd is beyond thrilled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen will be the final hurrah for the
two besties. Mejiro Palmer is determined to show
everyone what she's found by running away from
the Mejiro family.
